cases.title: Scenario matrix row for check-in eligibility rejects not-enrolled student
preconditions: Testing-plan §3 Check-in eligibility and duplicate block applies (FR-17, FR-18, BR-06, BR-07, AC-07, AC-08).
Open class session exists with valid QR token; authenticated student fixture has no Active enrollment in the target section.
steps: Authenticate as a student who is not actively enrolled in the session's class section.
Submit check-in with a valid qrToken for the open session.
Query persisted CheckInAttempt and AttendanceRecord for the student-session pair.
cases.expected: Check-in is rejected with outcome NotEnrolled per AC-07 coverage row; a failed CheckInAttempt is logged and no Present/Late AttendanceRecord is created.

cases.title: Enrollment module boundary rejects check-in without attendance success write
preconditions: Real database transaction is enabled for enrollment and check-in modules.
Open session with valid QR token exists; student actor is authenticated but enrollment row is absent or status is Dropped for the session section.
steps: Invoke check-in command with valid qrToken and resolved student actor lacking Active enrollment in target classSectionId.
Query enrollments, CheckInAttempt, and AttendanceRecord tables within the same transaction boundary.
Repeat with Active-enrolled student actor as positive control.
cases.expected: Not-enrolled invocation persists one failed CheckInAttempt with outcome NotEnrolled and creates no success AttendanceRecord; Active-enrolled control passes enrollment gate to subsequent validation steps.

cases.title: CheckInAttempt SM-04 terminates at NotEnrolled without attendance mutation
preconditions: Open class session with valid qrToken exists in integration test database.
Authenticated student has no Active enrollment for the session's class section.
steps: Capture beforeState: no Present/Late AttendanceRecord for the student-session pair.
Submit check-in command that passes authentication, session Open, and token Valid guards.
Capture afterState for CheckInAttempt outcome and AttendanceRecord rows.
cases.expected: SM-04 evaluation reaches NotEnrolled terminal state after enrollment guard (step 4 per validation order); afterState shows persisted failed attempt with NotEnrolled and no attendance status mutation.

cases.title: POST /v1/check-ins returns 422 envelope with NotEnrolled for unenrolled student
preconditions: Open class session with valid qrToken exists in test environment.
Authenticated student bearer token belongs to a user without Active enrollment in the session section.
steps: Call POST /v1/check-ins with Authorization Bearer token, valid qrToken, clientTimestamp, and Idempotency-Key.
Inspect HTTP status, response envelope (data/meta/error), and error.code.
Verify no success attendance payload is returned.
cases.expected: API returns 422 with standard envelope where data is null and error.code is NotEnrolled; response includes classSessionId in details where applicable and no attendance success outcome.

cases.title: Alternate workflow branch rejects authenticated student lacking section enrollment
preconditions: Student completes login gate (AC-06) with valid credentials.
Student scans valid QR for an Open session in a class section where they have no Active enrollment.
GPS policy is disabled or satisfied so enrollment is the next failing guard.
steps: Student calls POST /v1/auth/login and receives Student role accessToken.
Student calls POST /v1/check-ins with valid qrToken for the open session.
Lecturer queries GET /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/attendance for rejectedAttempts count.
Student queries own check-in attempt summary if exposed.
cases.expected: Authenticated flow fails at enrollment validation with NotEnrolled; session roster shows incremented rejectedAttempts and no new Present/Late row for the student; failed attempt is auditable per AC-18.

cases.title: Boundary error for Dropped enrollment and cross-section roster mismatch
preconditions: Student A has Active enrollment only in section X.
Open session exists in section Y with valid QR token.
Student B has Dropped enrollment row in section Y.
steps: Student A (enrolled in X only) submits POST /v1/check-ins with section Y session token.
Student B (Dropped in Y) submits POST /v1/check-ins with the same section Y token.
Inspect HTTP status and error.code for both requests and persisted attempt records.
cases.expected: Both requests return 422 with error.code NotEnrolled; each creates a failed CheckInAttempt with structured reason and no success AttendanceRecord regardless of prior Dropped vs absent enrollment row.

cases.title: Enrollment scope denial prevents cross-section check-in despite valid student role
preconditions: Student role is authenticated with valid bearer token per permission matrix.
Student has Active enrollment in section A only.
Open session with valid QR token exists in section B.
steps: Student calls POST /v1/check-ins with section B qrToken while enrolled only in section A.
Student calls POST /v1/check-ins with section A qrToken as authorized control.
Verify denial response contains no partial roster or attendance data from section B.
cases.expected: Cross-section attempt is denied with NotEnrolled (422) per scope-first enforcement (RBAC-02); control check-in for enrolled section A proceeds past enrollment gate; denied response leaks no restricted section data.

cases.title: UI journey surfaces NotEnrolled danger alert with no retry and admin guidance
preconditions: Student is logged in on mobile-web browser (PG-02 check-in page).
Open session QR token is valid; student is not actively enrolled in the target section.
steps: Navigate to check-in URL with valid token query parameter.
Submit check-in from the student check-in form.
Observe CheckInResultScreen failure state and alert component styling.
Verify absence of retry CTA and presence of contact-admin guidance per FLOW-02.
cases.expected: UI renders failure-not-enrolled danger alert with localized message (e.g. 'Bạn không thuộc lớp học phần này.'); no retry button is shown; student cannot reach success-present or success-late state.
